notes: Primary 4xA100 preflight for the March 19 top-1-style root challenger. Compile stays off here to keep the comparison focused on the recipe, not Hopper-specific systems behavior.
purpose: Check whether the root-trainer 10-layer Muon-WD/overtone/phase-transition port beats the legacy control on 4xA100.
success_criteria: Beat the control on post-export val_bpb without exceeding 16,000,000 bytes or regressing eval policy.
